# InterMiles Signature Credit Card
Sourcing of this Credit Card has been stopped. Existing customers of this card will continue to enjoy the benefits.
![Intermiles Signature Credit Card](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/intermile-signature-credit-card-desktop?fmt=webp)
What's in store for you:
  * [Card Benefits and Features](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/intermiles-signature-credit-card#benefits "Indulge in the exclusive benefits")
  * [Card Management and Controls](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/intermiles-signature-credit-card#card "Card Management")
  * [Frequently Asked Questions](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/intermiles-signature-credit-card#faq "FAQ")


![](https://house-fastly-signed-ap-southeast-1-prod.brightcovecdn.com/image/v1/static/6415735099001/129813d9-4144-4b80-acc2-3fd7a4a5291c/71cc62e1-3db2-4734-81cb-c60ec7161f21/1280x720/match/image.jpg?fastly_%3D%3D)

## Card Benefits and Features
### Milestone Benefits
  * InterMiles Silver membership for the first year,[ click here.(opens in a new tab)](https://www.intermiles.com/rewards-program/tiers-recognition/silver)
  * Up to 8,000 Bonus InterMiles.
  * 3,000 InterMiles upon spending ₹6,000 within the first 30 days.
  * 5,000 InterMiles on total retail spends of ₹90,000 and above.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/intermiles-signature-credit-card "View More")
![Intermiles Signature Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Lifestyle Benefits
  * ₹750 flight and ₹2000 hotel discount vouchers* for the first year.
  * Note:
  * *These ​​renewal benefits are only applicable upon ​​realisation of the membership fee.
  * 10% discount* on Etihad Airways Business Class tickets booked [here(opens in a new tab)](http://flights.intermiles.com/).
  * 5% discount* on Etihad Airways Economy Class tickets booked [here(opens in a new tab)](http://flights.intermiles.com/).
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://cards.intermiles.com/card-details/InterMiles-HDFC-Bank-Signature-Credit-Card) for terms and conditions.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/intermiles-signature-credit-card "View More")
![Intermiles Signature Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Travel Benefits
  * 16 complimentary visits per year (4 per quarter). 
  * Lounges may levy a nominal fee for card validation, depending on the network program. 
  * Lounges might charge a nominal fee for card validation, depending on the network program. 
  * [Click Here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/intermiles-signature/airport-info-intermiles-signature.pdf) for the list of lounges.
  * **MasterCard Lounge Program:** Avail 16 complimentary visits (4 per quarter).


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/intermiles-signature-credit-card "View More")
![Intermiles Signature Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Dining Benefits
  * Up to 20% discount on dining bills paid through Dineout Pay via your ​​​​InterMiles ​Credit Card.
  * (15% Dineout Discount plus an additional 5% HDFC Bank Discount).
  * Maximum discount per transaction capped at ₹1​,000.
  * Maximum discount per customer per month capped ​​​​at ₹1​​,000, [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://offers.smartbuy.hdfcbank.com/offer_details/dineout/16768/ZmmqmWs%3D) for more details.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/intermiles-signature-credit-card "View More")
![Intermiles Signature Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Know more about the card
  1. ### Card Control via MyCards
  2. ### Fees & Charges
  3. ### InterMiles Accrual Programme
  4. ### Credit and Safety
  5. ### Other Perks
  6. ### Priority Pass Membership
  7. ### Important Note
  8. ### Most Important Terms and Conditions


###  Card Control via MyCards 
  * Single Interface  
One unified platform for Credit Cards, Debit Cards, FASTag and Consumer Durable Loans 
  * Spends tracking   
Simple interface to track all your spends 
  * Reward Points   
View and redeem points at the push of a button


![Card Reward and Redemption](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Fees & Charges 
  * **InterMiles HDFC Bank Signature Credit Card Fees & Charges**
  * Joining/renewal membership fee: ₹2,500 plus applicable taxes.
  * The reversal of GST levied will not occur in the event of any dispute regarding fees and charges.
  * [Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/intermiles-signature-credit-card/fees-and-charges) to know more.


Note:
  * For cards sourced starting from November 1, 2020, the following terms and conditions apply:
  * The bank retains the authority to cancel the card if it remains inactive and is not used for any transactions for a continuous period of 6 (six) months after prior written notice is sent to the email address, phone number, and/or communication address registered in the bank's records.


![Card Management & Control](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  InterMiles Accrual Programme 
  * 6 InterMiles on every ₹150 spent on retail spends. 
  * 12 InterMiles on every ₹150 spent on flight tickets booked [here(opens in a new tab)](http://flights.intermiles.com/).
  * 12 InterMiles on every ₹150 spent on hotel bookings made [here(opens in a new tab)](http://interbook.intermiles.com/).


Note: 
  * Only retail purchases above ₹150 qualify for InterMiles.   
Cash advances, fuel transactions, fees, and other charges do not accrue any InterMiles. 
  * EasyEMI and e-wallet loading transactions will not accrue InterMiles.   
InterMiles accrued will be reversed if a retail transaction is converted into SmartEMI. 
  * InterMiles accrued for Insurance transactions will have a maximum cap of 2,000 per day. 


  * InterMiles, once credited, cannot be converted to Reward Points. 
  * ​​​InterMiles Credit Card plastic will be provided on the VISA franchisee upon the renewal of your existing MasterCard variant. 
  * For the Card renewal date, please check the existing Card expiry date. 
  * Effective October 01, 2017, keep your contact details updated on the Bank records.


![Card Management & Control](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Credit and Safety 
  * DIP your Chip Card at any chip-enabled POS or swipe your card at any non-chip POS (Regular POS). 
  * Zero liability on fraudulent transactions if reported immediately to our 24-hour call centre. 
  * Lowest Revolving Credit at an interest rate of 3.6% per month,[ ](https://www.hdfcbank.com/personal/pay/cards/credit-cards)[click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards).
  * Up to 50 days of free credit period from the date of purchase.
  * (This is subject to the submission of the charge by the Merchant).


![Redemption Limit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Other Perks 
  * Enjoy luxury travel with access to select airport lounges across India with our partners.
  * Present your InterMiles HDFC Bank World/Signature Credit Card and your boarding pass for access.
  * Avail up to 3 add-on cards for your immediate family members (over 18 years).
  * Card features only apply to the Primary Card Holder, not add-on card holders. 
  * 1% fuel surcharge waiver at all fuel stations across India on a minimum transaction of ₹400.
  * Maximum waiver capped at ₹500 every billing cycle, [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/intermiles-signature/fees-and-charges/pdf/other-perks.pdf).
  * ​​​Effective April 15th, 2016, InterMiles will not be accrued on fuel transactions. 
  * GST charges on fuel surcharge are non-refundable.


![Smart EMI](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Priority Pass Membership 
  * Complimentary enrollment ($99 value) in Priority Pass with access to 600+ lounges
  * The Primary Cardholder can enjoy up to 5 free annual visits to the International Lounges.
  * Please note :
  * Effective February 01, 2018
  * Lounge visits within India using a Priority Pass are charged at US $27 + GST as applicable per person per visit.
  * Lounge Visits outside India exceeding the complimentary visits charged at US $27 + GST as applicable per person per visit.
  * Guest visits using a Priority Pass are charged at US $27 + GST per visit per guest.
  * Charges are directly billed to your Credit Card statement within 90 days of the month of visit.
  * Lounge visits out of the Priority Pass network will be chargeable at the discretion of the respective lounges.
  * The dollar conversion rate will apply as per the prevailing billing rate. 
  * *The above fee is indicative, and usage charges may vary from lounge to lounge. Please visit [www.prioritypass.com(opens in a new tab)](https://www.prioritypass.com/) for more details.


![Enjoy Interest-free Credit Period](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Important Note 
  * Presenting InterMiles HDFC Bank Co-Brand Credit Card program with more exciting features. All the new features are applicable from September 25, 2020.
  * Experience the power of InterMiles (Formerly JPMiles). Now, you can continue to accrue and redeem InterMiles [here(opens in a new tab)](http://www.intermiles.com/).
  * The InterMiles card is being phased out. In January-February '23. 
  * All existing customers were notified via SMS/email and migrated to other cards after 30 days.
  * Effective January 01, 2023, we will be capping the rewards offering for payments made by customers on the following using the InterMiles Credit Cards.
  * Fees:   
A 1% fee will be applicable on ​​rental transactions from the second rental transaction of the calendar month.   
A 1% mark-up will be applicable on DCC transactions ​​grocery capping of 1,000 RP in a month.
  * Grocery capping of 1​​,000 RP in a month


![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Most Important Terms and Conditions 
  * The [Most Important Terms and Conditions(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/intermiles-signature/fees-and-charges/pdf/terms-and-condition.pdf) for each of our banking offerings features all the specific terms and conditions that govern their use. You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose.


![Intermiles HDFC Bank Signature Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)

##  Frequently Asked Questions 
###  What is an InterMiles Signature Credit Card?
The InterMiles Signature Credit Card is a travel and lifestyle card designed to elevate your experiences. It offers exclusive benefits, rewards, discounts on flights and hotels, complimentary lounge access, and more.
###  What is the credit limit of an InterMiles Signature Credit Card?
The credit limit for an InterMiles Signature Credit Card is determined based on various factors such as ​income, credit history, and bank policies.
###  How to apply for an InterMiles Signature Credit Card?
We are currently not accepting new applications for the HDFC Bank InterMiles Signature Credit Card. However, you can explore a range of other credit cards that may suit your needs. Click [here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards) to view our available options and find the right card for you.
